author: y4rr
content: Phase 2 plan: Add public set_running_mean(&[T]), set_running_var(&[T]), set_num_batches_tracked(usize) on BatchNorm1d/2d/3d. Each setter validates length==num_features, finiteness, var non-negativity, returns Err with named field on failure. Storage stays Mutex<Vec<f64>>; setters acquire same Mutex and convert T -> f64. Add a small object-safe trait (BatchNormBufferLoader) implemented for BN1/2/3d, exposing set_buffer_value(key, &Tensor<T>); ferrotorch-vision's load_torchvision_state_into_module walks named_modules() to find any BN module path and applies running_mean/running_var/num_batches_tracked from state dict. NO Module trait change, NO named_buffers override yet, NO forward path change, NO BN-forward CPU pull fix (out of scope per pre-flight). Round-trip unit tests + non-default running-stat-flow-through-eval-forward test will be added to ferrotorch-nn. Workspace boundary: only ferrotorch-nn/src and ferrotorch-vision/tests touched.
